task.title: Desktop Client Foundation
task.description: Create Electron app with system tray integration and native desktop notifications

implementation.details:
1. Set up Electron 28+ project with React
2. Implement system tray with badge count
3. Add native desktop notification support
4. Create main window with notification feed
5. Set up auto-updater and cross-platform builds

task.acceptance_criteria: Electron app starts, system tray shows unread count, desktop notifications appear, main window displays notifications
